prompt: Generate a two-panel meme (horizontal).Left panel with first image and with caption: 'THE ONE WHO DID ALL THE WORK'. Right panel with the second image and with caption: 'THE ONE WHO MADE THE SLIDES'. Use classic meme-style bold white uppercase text, top-centered.
prompt_refined: Generate a horizontal two-panel meme. The left panel must display image 1 (featuring a disgruntled Shrek-like character) with the top-centered caption 'THE ONE WHO DID ALL THE WORK'. The right panel must display image 2 (featuring a smiling Barbie-like character in front of a burning car) with the top-centered caption 'THE ONE WHO MADE THE SLIDES'. All captions should use classic meme-style bold white uppercase text.
objects: Top-centered caption 'THE ONE WHO DID ALL THE WORK' (bold white uppercase text, in left panel)
Burning car (in right panel, behind Barbie-like character)
Top-centered caption 'THE ONE WHO MADE THE SLIDES' (bold white uppercase text, in right panel)
